report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#460-464) and Newsletter v45 covering DRIFT protocol attack, DeFi lending reviews (Aave/Compound/MakerDAO), CLARITY Act four-way deadlock, Morpho Protocol guide, and extended extreme fear accumulation zone. Created 3 social card SVGs. Analytics identified Fear & Greed tool, DCA Calculator, and 10 newly published pages (lending reviews + learn guides) as top-performing content aligned with security concerns and regulatory catalysts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #460: DRIFT protocol exploit — 40% drop, 6000% funding rate, DeFi security checklist (3-tweet thread, Sat May 10)
Tweet #461: New DeFi lending reviews launch — Aave, Compound, MakerDAO compared (single tweet, Mon May 12)
Tweet #462: CLARITY Act four-way deadlock — yield deal done, 3 blocks remain, Polymarket 72% (3-tweet thread, Tue May 13)
Tweet #463: Morpho Protocol spotlight — permissionless vaults, isolated risk markets (single tweet, Wed May 14)
Tweet #464: Extreme Fear Week 2 — two-week sub-10 F&G, $316B stablecoin supply, historical accumulation signal (3-tweet thread, Thu May 15)
Newsletter v45: 'Extreme Fear Week 2: DeFi Hacks, Lending Reviews & the CLARITY Act Deadlock' — security alert, regulation update, 10 new pages, FOMC catalyst (Thu May 15)
Discord/Telegram announcement: 10 new pages shipped this week + DRIFT attack coverage + CLARITY Act deadlock (Mon May 12)

sections.title: Social Cards Created
items: 2026-04-03-social-card-drift-protocol-attack.svg — 1200x630 security alert card with -40% price drop, 6000%+ funding rate, flash loan attack vector in red-themed glass-morphism layout
2026-04-03-social-card-defi-lending-reviews.svg — 1200x630 triple protocol comparison card (Aave purple, Compound blue, MakerDAO green) with key features for each

sections.title: Market Context Driving Content Strategy
items: BTC at $66,868, down 0.82% in 24h — holding $66K support through geopolitical turbulence
ETH at $2,058, down 2.59% — ETH/BTC ratio at 0.030 (15-month low)
Total crypto market cap $2.38T, down 2.4% in 24h
F&G Index at 9 — two consecutive weeks of extreme fear, longest stretch since Terra-Luna June 2022
DRIFT Protocol exploited — token down 40%, funding rates spiked 6,000%+, flash loan attack vector
CLARITY Act stalled in four-way deadlock — yield deal done, jurisdiction/DeFi/ethics language contested
Senate Banking markup targeted late April after Easter recess ends April 13
Polymarket: 72% probability CLARITY Act signed in 2026 (up from 60%)
Morgan Stanley spot BTC ETF filing at 0.14% fee — undercutting BlackRock by 44%
US spot BTC ETFs saw $173.7M net outflow on April 1 — institutional cooling entering Q2
Telegram launched perp futures (via Lighter) with 50x leverage — mainstream DeFi access expanding
Stablecoin supply at $316B ATH — record dry powder on sidelines
FOMC April 28-29 next major catalyst — BTC moved 5%+ on each of last 4 FOMC days

sections.title: Analytics Summary — Growth Trajectories
items: 647 published page slugs total (up from 637 yesterday — 10 new pages published today)

10 new pages published April 3: Aave/Compound/MakerDAO loan reviews, Crypto.com Visa review, Best DeFi Lending on Ethereum, Morpho Protocol, Account Abstraction, Chain Abstraction, MEV Guide, Solana vs Ethereum
2 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE (deferred — need page.tsx scaffolds): impermanent-loss, hyperliquid-perp-dex
464 total tweets drafted all-time (up from 454 in v43)
45 newsletter editions total (v44 + v45)
94+ OG images/social cards (91 prior + 3 new this cycle)

Content pipeline aligned with peak demand: DRIFT attack drives security guide traffic, extreme fear drives DCA/F&G tool usage, CLARITY Act deadlock drives stablecoin guide searches, new lending reviews capture DeFi lending comparison queries

Highest growth trajectory: Fear & Greed tool (sustained F&G sub-10 = peak organic search), DeFi lending content (3 new reviews + comparison page), Stablecoins guide (CLARITY Act deadlock catalyst), Security guide (DRIFT exploit drives awareness)
